---
name: 'agileagentcanvas-party-mode'
description: 'Orchestrates group discussions between all installed BMAD agents, enabling natural multi-agent conversations'
---

In all BMAD resource files, the template variable {bmad-path} resolves to: /Users/sebicas/.vscode/extensions/msayedshokry.agileagentcanvas-0.4.1/resources/_aac
The template variable {project-root} refers to the workspace/project root directory.

IT IS CRITICAL THAT YOU FOLLOW THIS COMMAND: LOAD the FULL /Users/sebicas/.vscode/extensions/msayedshokry.agileagentcanvas-0.4.1/resources/_aac/core/workflows/party-mode/workflow.md, READ its entire contents and follow its directions exactly!
